ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_AlternatorEFurnace
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: This version of the furnace allows automate control, which smelts only crushed metals. Consumes 10 power.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_AutoMiner
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Very powerful miner which can collect metals, takes a full day to complete. Consumes 20 power.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_CeramicKiln
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Cooks clay into Bricks, which is required by most machines. Consumes 5 power.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_ChromiumFurnace
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: State of the art industrial grade furnace, smelts at 4x speed AND 2x output. Consumes 20 power.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_CombustionGenerator
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: A Generator that converts 3 coal into 1 batt. pack or Solar & Void essence to produce 3 Batt. Packs. Produces 20 power.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_CombustionMiner
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: A weaker variant to the Auto Miner, takes coal as fuel. Consumes 5 power.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_ElectricFurnace
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Smelts regular and crushed ores at twice the speed, doesn't need coal to operate. Consumes 5 power.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_GardenCloche
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: An extremely powerful cloche, supply it with 24 of the same seed, and in return, get iridium quality crops (Time varies). Consumes 5 water. Consumes 10 power.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_GemPolisher
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: An exotic gem polisher, allows upgrading gems to iridium quality. Consumes 20 power.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_HayBin
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: A bin that turns fiber into hay. Consumes 5 power.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_HayRehydrator
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: A bin that turns hay into fiber. Consumes 1 water. Consumes 5 power.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_IndustrialDistillery
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Larger more efficent Keg, takes 5 of the same item, and does it at twice the speed, keeps quality and sell value increased. Consumes 5 power.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_JojaColaGenerator
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Pierre is smart, so smart infact, he invented a machine which uses Joja Cola as a fuel source, by adding 10 cans, you too can make 1 battery, I bet Morris feels envious. Produces 5 power.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_MineralWasher
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Cleans up minerals to improve quality. Consumes 5 water. Consumes 20 power.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_PreservativePress
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Larger more efficent perserves jar, takes 5 of the same item, and does it at twice the speed, keeps quality and sell value increased. Consumes 5 power.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_Pulverizer
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Crushing 5 ores will net you two pulverized powder, can only be used in Electric Furnaces. Consumes 5 power.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_RockCrusher
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Can break down 5 stone for a chance of ore, break down metal bars into pulverized metal, or break higher quality ore into multiple lower quality ores. Consumes 5 power.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_SuperGardenCloche
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: A powered up version of the garden cloche, supply it with 480 of the same seed, and in return, get iridium quality crops (Time varies). Consumes 100 water. Consumes 100 power.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_TreeCloche
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Tree nursery which grows trees faster and produces wood. Consumes 5 power.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_BatteryCharger
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Takes power from the grid to make batteries. Consumes 10 power.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_ChemicalProcessingMachine
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Refines Coal Into Fuel, Oil into Refined Oil, and Heavy Oil into Solid Fuel. Consumes 10 water. Consumes 10 power.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_ElectricGenerator
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Converts Coal, Fuel, or Batteries. Produces 30 power.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_NuclearGenerator
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Uses Nuclear Fission with Radioactive Bars or Refined Uranium. Produces 200 power.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_OilDrill
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: Very powerful miner which can collect metals, takes a full day to complete. Consumes 5 water. Consumes 5 power.

ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Name: ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilityGridRedux_SolarGenerator
ThaleTheGreat.IndustrializationForUtilit.Description: A unique generator which requires sunlight to operate, doesn't work whiles indoors or at night. Produces 10 power.
